installCommand: corepack enable pnpm && cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false
buildCommand: rm -rf artifacts/api-server/.vercel && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/api && cp artifacts/api-server/dist/api/index.js artifacts/api-server/api/index.js

headers.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, OPTIONS
